channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: Putin visits China to reaffirm Russia ties
item.description: The Kremlin has said Putin and Xi plan to discuss economic cooperation between the two countries, but also "key international and regional issues."
item.content:encoded:
The Kremlin has said Putin and Xi plan to discuss economic cooperation between the two countries, but also "key international and regional issues."

(Image credit: Alexander Kazakov)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Mark Fuhrman, ex-detective convicted of lying during OJ Simpson trial, has died
item.description: Fuhrman was one of the first two police detectives sent to investigate the 1994 killings of OJ Simpson's ex-wife Nicole Brown Simpson and her friend, Ronald Goldman, in Los Angeles.
item.content:encoded:
Fuhrman was one of the first two police detectives sent to investigate the 1994 killings of OJ Simpson's ex-wife Nicole Brown Simpson and her friend, Ronald Goldman, in Los Angeles.

(Image credit: REED SAXON)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Colbert's last episodes: What happened on 'The Late Show' last night
item.description: Stephen Colbert spent Monday's show revisiting material that never made it to air, performing for a studio audience made up entirely of his staff.
item.content:encoded:
Stephen Colbert spent Monday's show revisiting material that never made it to air, performing for a studio audience made up entirely of his staff.

(Image credit: Angela Weiss)
item.dc:creator: Eric Deggans

item.title: Trump says he's called off Iran strike at request of Gulf allies
item.description: President Donald Trump says he is holding off on a military strike on Iran planned for Tuesday because "serious negotiations" are underway to end the war.
item.content:encoded:
President Donald Trump says he is holding off on a military strike on Iran planned for Tuesday because "serious negotiations" are underway to end the war.

(Image credit: Vahid Salemi)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Why you should care about 2 power companies merging. Hint: affordability
item.description: NextEra Energy plans to acquire Dominion Energy to create the largest electricity producer in the United States.
item.content:encoded:
NextEra Energy plans to acquire Dominion Energy to create the largest electricity producer in the United States.

(Image credit: Marco Bello)
item.dc:creator: Stephan Bisaha

item.title: 'SNL' just wrapped its 51st season: It's time to cruelly rank its musical guests
item.description: The latest season of Saturday Night Live felt transitional in many ways, but it was full of blockbuster pop stars, up-and-coming bands and musical legends. We ranked them from worst to best.
item.content:encoded:
The latest season of Saturday Night Live felt transitional in many ways, but it was full of blockbuster pop stars, up-and-coming bands and musical legends. We ranked them from worst to best.

(Image credit: Will Heath)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Thompson

item.title: Tuesday is a big primary day. Here's what you need to know
item.description: Six states are holding primaries May 19 that could help to decide the balance of power in Congress and in key state governments.
item.content:encoded:
Six states are holding primaries May 19 that could help to decide the balance of power in Congress and in key state governments.

(Image credit: Megan Varner)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler

item.title: Is Kennedy heir Jack Schlossberg ready to lead?
item.description: NPR's Juana Summers speaks with Jack Schlossberg, Democratic candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District and the grandson of President John F. Kennedy.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Juana Summers speaks with Jack Schlossberg, Democratic candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District and the grandson of President John F. Kennedy.
item.dc:creator: Mia Venkat

item.title: This Ebola outbreak raises questions about when it all began — and the U.S. response
item.description: The sheer number of cases and deaths are a sign that the outbreak might have been smoldering before the virus was identified.
item.content:encoded:
The sheer number of cases and deaths are a sign that the outbreak might have been smoldering before the virus was identified.

(Image credit: Badru Katumba/AFP)
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Lambert

item.title: Jury dismisses all claims in Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman
item.description: Musk had sought to oust Altman from his leadership position over claims that he and others breached their duty to OpenAI's original nonprofit mission and unjustly enriched themselves.
item.content:encoded:
Musk had sought to oust Altman from his leadership position over claims that he and others breached their duty to OpenAI's original nonprofit mission and unjustly enriched themselves.

(Image credit: Godofredo A. Vásquez)
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch
